title: aster tenellus var. cotuloides
intro: Aster tenellus var. cotuloides, also known as White Pyrethrum or Cotula-like Aster, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin issues, and infections. The health benefits of Aster tenellus var. cotuloides include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and fighting off bacterial and fungal infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
